name: Suno API
pricing_notes: Free: 50 credits/day; Pro $8/mo (2,500 credits); Premier $24/mo (10,000 credits)

auth.notes: Authorization: Bearer token; key from suno.com dashboard

performance.notes: Song generation takes 15-60 seconds; async polling required; not suitable for real-time use

agent_readiness.notes: Submit generation job, poll for completion. Generates 2 variations per request. Supports custom lyrics, style prompts, genre tags. No official SDK.

gotchas: No official SDK — must build polling logic manually
Generation time (15-60s) makes synchronous integration impractical
No webhook support for completion notification
Rate limits can block agents doing bulk generation
Music ownership/licensing terms complex for commercial use
best_when: Generating background music or audio for AI content pipelines
Creative applications where generation latency is acceptable
avoid_when: Real-time or low-latency audio generation needed
Commercial products requiring clear music licensing
summary: Suno's API enables programmatic AI music generation from text prompts. Market leader in AI music quality. Severely limited for agent use: no SDK, long generation times (15-60s), no webhooks, complex polling required. Best for creative content pipelines that can tolerate async generation. Commercial licensing terms require careful review.
